notes: Removed all-caps treatment across the songs UI and switched metadata labels to normal title-case rendering.
Preserved hierarchy by keeping lighter tracking on labels instead of relying on forced uppercase.
Retained the earlier score density, duplicate-label cleanup, and grid-width fixes.
open_issues: Chord strings that contain multiple symbols inside a single measure still rely on free-form text, so very dense charts may eventually need beat-level notation treatment.
At least one provisional source value remains ambiguous, including the existing `Fmb` chord spelling in the seeded chart data.
The songs workspace still uses local static data only, so async loading and error states remain intentionally deferred.
